result.summary: Freesound exposes one developer surface: the Freesound API v2 HTTP API at https://freesound.org/apiv2, authenticated by either API key query/header token auth or OAuth2 authorization-code credentials issued via /apiv2/apply.

freesound_api_credential.label: Freesound API credential
freesound_api_credential.setup: Create a [Freesound account](https://freesound.org/) and request a new API credential at [https://freesound.org/apiv2/apply](https://freesound.org/apiv2/apply). Freesound issues one credential per application, consisting of a `client_id`/`client_secret` pair for OAuth2 and an API key for token access. Use the `Client secret/Api key` value as the API key for token auth, or use the OAuth2 `client_id` and `client_secret` for authorization-code flow. Keep the credential private and request a separate one for each app.
